body.title: Memory full-text storage
body.result: Raised TWM promotion narrative limit from 500→2000 chars in narrative_engine.py _deep_consolidation_pass step1; raised extraction prompt input from 200→400 chars in consolidation.py. No schema change needed — narrative is TEXT. 6 new tests.
body.description: consolidation pass truncates narratives at ~300 chars; full insight lost — add full-text storage or larger narrative limit
